name: drift
description: Reads Drift users, accounts, conversations, contacts, and teams, and writes contact/account/message/conversation/timeline-event/GDPR mutations through the Drift REST API.

risk.read: external Drift API read of conversational-marketing users, accounts, conversations, contacts, and teams
risk.write: external Drift API mutation of contacts, accounts, conversations, messages, timeline events, and GDPR data-subject requests; delete_contact/delete_account/gdpr_delete are destructive and require approval
risk.approval: required for delete_contact, delete_account, and gdpr_delete; other create/update writes are lower-risk marketing/support-data mutations
